g.text: Saare systems se data aata hai

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does web app send analytics data?')
sendPrompt('How does mobile app send analytics events?')
sendPrompt('How does chatbot analytics data get tracked?')
sendPrompt('How does ML pipeline send metrics to dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does event collection and tracking work in analytics?')
g.text: Segment · Mixpanel SDK · Custom events · Kafka streams · n8n triggers
Raw events ko meaningful data mein badlo

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is real time stream processing in analytics?')
sendPrompt('What is batch processing in analytics pipelines?')
sendPrompt('How does data aggregation work for dashboards?')
sendPrompt('What is a data warehouse used for analytics?')
sendPrompt('How does time series database work for metrics?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used for real time analytics caching?')

g.text: Jo user dekhta hai dashboard par

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What charts and graphs are used in analytics dashboards?')
sendPrompt('How do KPI metric cards work in dashboards?')
sendPrompt('How do real time live dashboards work?')
sendPrompt('How do scheduled analytics reports work?')

svg.text: n8n scheduled reports bhejta hai aur anomaly alerts trigger karta hai
